# apcore-toolkit

> Shared scanner, schema extraction, and output toolkit that apcore framework adapters build on — the common plumbing behind apcore-mcp, apcore-cli, and the framework integrations.

apcore-toolkit provides reusable building blocks for adapters: smart scanning to discover modules, schema extraction (including from OpenAPI and Pydantic), binding loaders, and output writers/formatting. It is a library for adapter authors rather than an end-user runtime.

## Start Here

- [Home](https://apcore-toolkit.aiperceivable.com/): What the toolkit provides and which adapters depend on it.
- [Getting Started](https://apcore-toolkit.aiperceivable.com/getting-started/): Use the toolkit to build or extend an apcore adapter.
- [Scope & Boundaries](https://apcore-toolkit.aiperceivable.com/scope/): What the toolkit is responsible for and what it deliberately leaves to adapters.

## Features

- [Features Overview](https://apcore-toolkit.aiperceivable.com/features/overview/): Map of scanning, schema, binding, and output components.
- [Smart Scanning](https://apcore-toolkit.aiperceivable.com/features/scanning/): Discovers modules and bindings across a project.
- [OpenAPI Integration](https://apcore-toolkit.aiperceivable.com/features/openapi/): Extracts schemas from OpenAPI definitions.
- [Schema Utilities](https://apcore-toolkit.aiperceivable.com/features/pydantic/): Pydantic-based schema extraction and conversion helpers.
- [Output Writers](https://apcore-toolkit.aiperceivable.com/features/output-writers/): Render adapter output in different formats.
- [Binding Loader](https://apcore-toolkit.aiperceivable.com/features/binding-loader/): Loads decorator/YAML bindings into module definitions.
- [Convention Scanning](https://apcore-toolkit.aiperceivable.com/features/convention-scanning/): Convention-based discovery of modules.

## More

- [AI Enhancement](https://apcore-toolkit.aiperceivable.com/ai-enhancement/): How the toolkit enriches modules for better AI perception.
- [Changelog](https://apcore-toolkit.aiperceivable.com/changelog/): Notable changes across releases.

## Ecosystem

- [apcore](https://apcore.aiperceivable.com/): The core module standard the toolkit supports.
- [apcore-mcp](https://apcore-mcp.aiperceivable.com/): MCP bridge built on the toolkit.
- [apcore-cli](https://apcore-cli.aiperceivable.com/): CLI adapter built on the toolkit.
- [apcore-a2a](https://apcore-a2a.aiperceivable.com/): Agent-to-Agent (A2A) protocol adapter built on the toolkit.
- [apflow](https://apflow.aiperceivable.com/): Orchestration layer for long-running, multi-step agent task workflows.
- [AI Perceivable (ecosystem hub)](https://aiperceivable.com/): Overview of the full ecosystem — apcore (perception), apflow (orchestration), and adapters.

## Key Facts

- Shared library for building apcore framework adapters.
- Provides scanning, schema extraction (OpenAPI/Pydantic), binding loading, and output writers.
- Used by apcore-mcp, apcore-cli, and framework integrations.
- For adapter authors, not an end-user runtime.
- Open source. Source: https://github.com/aiperceivable/apcore-toolkit
